title: Lil Tjay sparks backlash after exposing private messages linked to Kai Cenat’s ex-girlfriend
summary_full: Lil Tjay sparked online backlash after briefly posting and deleting screenshots of private messages allegedly involving Kai Cenat’s ex-girlfriend, Gigi Alayah. Fans criticised the rapper for exposing personal conversations, while others defended his actions amid ongoing tension with Cenat. The streamer has not publicly responded, and the controversy has already reignited debates about clout-chasing, celebrity privacy, and social media drama in entertainment culture.
